name: College party
description:
[A personal, experiment bot Bite99 decided to upload]

A sandbox scenario where you’re at a fictional college, at a fictional party, with fictional characters. Hook up, do crazy drugs, get in a fight…. It’s up to you.

There are around 15 Female characters built in to this. They aren’t in anywhere near as much detail as my other characters, but all that does is allow the ai to uniquely build the characters (if each one was in high detail it would be like 20k tokens).

Bite99’s only scenario bot. Anyways, another reupload.

Bonus pic:
creator: Little Big Planet
